name: Marcus
systemNote: A Tamer with this class does not gain Hope from a long rest. Digisoul Strike is the only source of Hope generation unless another ability states otherwise.

abilities.name: Digisoul Strike
abilities.description: The Tamer with this class may use their Basic Action to make a melee attack against one adjacent enemy. This is a PR 2 attack. For every point of damage dealt, the Tamer gains 1 Hope immediately. This ability replaces long rest Hope recovery entirely. The Tamer with this class does not gain Hope from a long rest. Digisoul Strike is the only source of Hope generation unless another ability states otherwise. Digisoul Strike has no per-encounter limit. It can be used every turn.

abilities.name: Stronger Strike
abilities.description: Digisoul Strike becomes a PR 4 attack. The Hope generation rate does not change.

abilities.name: Raw Digisoul
abilities.description: Digisoul Strike generates 2 Hope per damage dealt instead of 1. The PR does not change.

abilities.name: Harder
abilities.description: Digisoul Strike becomes a PR 5 attack. Additionally whenever Digisoul Strike scores a critical hit, the total Hope generated by that hit is doubled.

abilities.name: Hotter
abilities.description: Digisoul Strike generates 3 Hope per damage dealt instead of 2.

abilities.name: Double Digisoul Burst
abilities.description: Digisoul Strike becomes a PR 6 attack and generates 3 Hope per damage dealt. These values replace any previous PR and Hope rate from earlier rows. Once per session at the start of the Tamer's turn, they may declare Double Digisoul Burst. This turn Digisoul Strike costs no action — it is a Free Action in addition to any other actions the Tamer takes. When this Free Action hit lands, the partner Digimon immediately gains temporary HP equal to the total Hope generated by that single hit.
